title: Conjugates of drug units and targeting units and precursor compounds thereof
abstract: Provided herein is a Drug-Linker of Formula (I) or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof, wherein D is a drug unit, K1 is selected from (i) a peptide unit, (ii) an oligosaccharide, and (iii) a polyether, and M1 is a group which can react with a ligand to form a connector unit. Such compounds can be useful as anti-cancer agents.
claims:
